sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měi tiān jǐ diǎn qǐ chuáng?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Во сколько ты встаёшь каждый день?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you get up every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我一般六点半起床。你呢？
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yì bān liù diǎn bàn qǐ chuáng. Nǐ ne?
sentences.text_translation: Men odatda olti yarimda turaman. Sen-chi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я обычно встаю в полседьмого. А ты?
sentences.text_translation_en: I usually get up at six thirty. And you?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我七点起床。我起得比较晚。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ qī diǎn qǐ chuáng. Wǒ qǐ de bǐ jiào wǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Men yettida turaman. Ancha kech turaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я встаю в семь. Я встаю довольно поздно.
sentences.text_translation_en: I get up at seven. I get up rather late.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zǎo shang chī shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you eat in the morning?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我常常吃面包和鸡蛋，喝一杯牛奶。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ cháng cháng chī miàn bāo hé jī dàn, hē yì bēi niú nǎi.
sentences.text_translation: Ko'pincha non va tuxum yeyman, bir stakan sut ichaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я часто ем хлеб и яйца, пью стакан молока.
sentences.text_translation_en: I often eat bread and eggs, and drink a glass of milk.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_ru: Во сколько ты идёшь на работу?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you go to work?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 八点半上班。我走路去公司。
sentences.pinyin: Bā diǎn bàn shàng bān. Wǒ zǒu lù qù gōng sī.
sentences.text_translation: Sakkiz yarimda ishga boraman. Kompaniyaga piyoda boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Начинаю в полдевятого. Я хожу на работу пешком.
sentences.text_translation_en: I start at eight thirty. I walk to the company.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: How long does it take to walk?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Dà gài èr shí fēn zhōng.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ wǎn shang jǐ diǎn huí jiā?
sentences.text_translation: Unda kechqurun soat nechada uyga qaytasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А во сколько ты возвращаешься домой вечером?
sentences.text_translation_en: So what time do you get home in the evening?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 六点下班，六点半左右到家。
sentences.pinyin: Liù diǎn xià bān, liù diǎn bàn zuǒ yòu dào jiā.
sentences.text_translation: Oltida ishdan chiqaman, olti yarimlarda uyga yetaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В шесть заканчиваю работу, дома около полседьмого.
sentences.text_translation_en: I finish at six and get home around six thirty.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Huí jiā yǐ hòu zuò shén me?
sentences.text_translation_en: What do you do after you get home?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 先做饭，然后看电视或者看书。
sentences.pinyin: Xiān zuò fàn, rán hòu kàn diàn shì huò zhě kàn shū.
sentences.text_translation: Avval ovqat tayyorlayman, keyin televizor ko'raman yoki kitob o'qiyman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сначала готовлю, потом смотрю телевизор или читаю.
sentences.text_translation_en: First I cook, then I watch TV or read.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you go to sleep?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ de shēng huó hěn yǒu guī lǜ.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда у тебя очень размеренная жизнь.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then your life is very regular.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 对，习惯了。早睡早起对身体好。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, xí guàn le. Zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ duì shēn tǐ hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, odatlanib qoldim. Erta yotib erta turish sog'liq uchun foydali.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, привык. Рано ложиться и рано вставать полезно для здоровья.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, I'm used to it. Early to bed and early to rise is good for your health.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你说得对，我也应该早睡。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, wǒ yě yīng gāi zǎo shuì.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri aytasan, men ham erta yotishim kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты прав, мне тоже стоит ложиться раньше.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're right, I should go to bed early too.
sentences.speaker: B
